sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, data_map MAP<INT, STRING>, value DECIMAL(10, 2));
SELECT id, element_at(data_map, 100) // value AS computed_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, element_at(data_map, 200) // COALESCE(value, 1) AS fallback_value FROM test_table WHERE element_at(data_map, 100) IS NOT NULL;

WITH subquery AS (SELECT id, element_at(data_map, 100) AS map_value FROM test_table WHERE value > 5) SELECT id, map_value // COUNT(*) AS average_map_value FROM subquery GROUP BY id, map_value HAVING average_map_value < 3;
SELECT id, (element_at(data_map, 300) // NULLIF(value, 0)) AS safe_division FROM test_table WHERE data_map IS NOT NULL;
WITH empty_map AS (SELECT map([], []) AS empty_m) SELECT element_at(empty_m, 1) // 4 AS division_result FROM empty_map;
SELECT id, element_at(data_map, 100) // 0.01 AS critical_division FROM test_table ORDER BY critical_division DESC;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_test AS SELECT id, value, element_at(data_map, 100) AS extracted_value FROM test_table WHERE id < 3;
SELECT id, extracted_value // (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_test) AS group_division FROM temp_test;
